name: Tropical Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pineapple chunks (can size depends on personal taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the chicken and thread it onto skewers, alternating with canned pineapple chunks.
2. Brush the chicken pieces with soy sauce.
3. Grill or broil until the chicken is cooked through.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the pineapple juice, marmalade, yogurt, mustard, and curry powder to make a dip.
5. Serve the dip alongside the grilled kabobs.
